blockers.detail: IceCube HESE public data release does not include livetime tables accessible to this pipeline.
IceCube analysis uses isotropic null which does not require exposure; exposure correction is not applicable.
IceCube effective area and event selection efficiency as a function of direction are not available in this pipeline.

recommendation: Use isotropic null. Do not attempt exposure correction for IceCube HESE without validated livetime and effective-area data.
